overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a futuristic waterfront cityscape in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077 aesthetic), moving from a paved promenade onto a multi-lane road and past a group of people sitting on benches, with modern glass buildings and palm trees lining the route during golden hour.

events.description: pedestrian in yellow pants passes closely by on the left, temporarily blocking part of the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade, approaching oncoming pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera wearing dark jacket and yellow pants, passes closely on the left side

entered.detail: metal railing separating the walkway from the water, running parallel to the path
tall futuristic buildings with dark glass facades and geometric architectural details
tall palm trees lining the street in front of the buildings
modern street lamp with horizontal orange light fixture
large suspension bridge visible in the distance across the water

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide waterfront promenade during golden hour, with a metal railing on the left overlooking the water and futuristic glass buildings on the right. Palm trees line the street, and a pedestrian in yellow pants approaches and passes by closely.

events.description: steps off the paved sidewalk onto the asphalt road surface

agents.ego_description: walking along the empty multi-lane road, moving toward the center of the street away from the waterfront

entered.detail: dark asphalt road with visible cracks and wear, double yellow lines running down the center
double yellow lines dividing the road lanes
litter and debris scattered across the road surface including paper and cans

segments.scene_description: Having moved onto the asphalt road, the camera continues forward along the empty multi-lane street. The waterfront railing recedes into the distance on the left, while the modern glass buildings remain prominent on the right. Scattered trash is visible on the road surface.

events.description: moves from the road onto the sidewalk area approaching a group of seated people

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a group of people seated on concrete benches, observing the waterfront social area

notable_agents.action: group of three people sitting on a curved concrete bench, one wearing bright green pants stands up as camera approaches
person wearing colorful outfit and helmet sitting on the bench holding an object

entered.detail: curved white concrete bench seating with people gathered around it

segments.scene_description: Moving onto the sidewalk area, the camera approaches a social gathering spot with people sitting on curved concrete benches. The modern buildings now loom closer on the right, while palm trees line the left side. The scene shows a moderate crowd density with individuals relaxing and conversing in the golden hour light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a scenic waterfront promenade into a bustling urban social space during the golden hour. It begins by gliding along a wide walkway beside a metal railing and futuristic glass buildings, passing a pedestrian in yellow pants who moves closely by. As the camera transitions onto the asphalt of a multi-lane road, the waterfront railing recedes into the distance while scattered trash appears on the street surface. The scene then shifts toward the sidewalk, where the modern architecture looms closer on the right and palm trees line the left. Finally, the movement leads into a gathering spot where a moderate crowd of people relaxes and converses on curved concrete benches under the warm evening light.
